channel.title: Dolls Playsets on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand Kids’ Pretend Play Food Set Gift Idea for Girls and Boys Aged 6 and over with 2 Mini-Dolls a Turtle Figure and Accessories 42625
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand Kids’ Pretend Play Food Set Gift Idea for Girls and Boys Aged 6 and over with 2 Mini-Dolls a Turtle Figure and Accessories 42625 here: ℹ️: 2 LEGO Friends characters – This set comes with a turtle figure, plus a Niko mini-doll and a Nova LEGO Friends mini-doll with an extra face Create the beach scene – As well as a buildable smoothie stand, this set comes with a buildable beach buggy, a swing, a cooler and a signpost Lots of accessories – Includes strawberry, banana, blueberry, orange, yoghurt and peanut butter smoothie ingredients, plus glasses and much more Play food set – This LEGO Friends Beach Smoothie Stand role-play toy for 6-plus-year-old girls and boys includes 2 mini-dolls and a turtle figure Mix up smoothie combinations – Imaginative play is lots of fun with this LEGO Friends set as kids choose ingredients and place them in the blender A gift idea for kids – This LEGO Friends set makes a fun gift idea for 6-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who love food toys and friendship stories 🛒 Buy it now!
